provenance.spec_baseline_note: Public commit of the frozen SPEC/AEP-IR-1.0.md; the report's baseline of record.
provenance.instrument_head_note: Published HEAD of the calibrated instrument (validator/runner/prompt/canonical). Read-only until the REPORT: any change re-gates (new GATE 0, new hash, new pilot). This manifest commit is metadata-only, so no instrument file changed after 0d347bc.

canonicalization.note: Hard dependency (requirements.txt). The frozen Canonicalization Standard names RFC 8785; canonicaljson is NOT RFC 8785 and diverges on number serialization.

spec_fixable_rationale: Pre-registered BEFORE generation and frozen at GATE 0. Kept deliberately after reading the Origin Rules section of the frozen spec: OR-1 is a clear rule with three defined origins (producer, default, external scope), transmitted verbatim in prompt.md Rule 5, so a plan that still fails OR-1 is arguably violating an explicit instruction (leaning prompt/model). However, the structural trap remains a spec-design property — the class 'readonly + execution-scoped + no default' is unsatisfiable, so a generator reasoning semantically can fall into OR-1 in good faith. A conservative pre-registration that over-includes is defensible; editing the set after seeing results would be tampering. Decision: keep, deliberately.

generator.mechanism: scripted API, fresh isolated context per plan
generator.sampling: n/a — temperature/top_p/top_k removed on claude-opus-4-8; default sampling
generator.context: input-coder.md as sole user message; no system prompt additions; account memory disabled/absent (raw API call)
